scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.screenshots:export: npm run build && sh -c 'npx vite preview --port 4173 --strictPort & PID=$!; sleep 4; node scripts/screenshots.mjs https://localhost:4173; kill "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true'
scripts.screenshots:ori-homepage: npm run build && sh -c 'npx vite preview --port 4173 --strictPort & PID=$!; sleep 5; node scripts/ori-homepage-screenshots.mjs https://localhost:4173; kill "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true'
scripts.screenshots:ori-export: npm run build && sh -c 'npx vite preview --port 4173 --strictPort & PID=$!; sleep 5; node scripts/ori-export-screenshots.mjs https://localhost:4173; kill "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true'
